sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n80880" key="pentw/numos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πεντ-ώνῠμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n80880.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">called by five names</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg9022.tlg003:p.29" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Tz.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Proll.Com.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.29</biblScope> </bibl> K.</sense> </entryFree>
